liked.title: Coloring inside the Bible
liked.sub: Woven into the text, not separate

liked.title: Thick, quality paper
liked.sub: Holds up to colored pencils, no bleed

liked.title: Wide ruled margins
liked.sub: Journal and color at the same time

caveat_body: This is a full Bible — heavy and priced accordingly. Detailed line art suits adults and older teens, not young children looking for simple designs.
caveat_sub: Best for: adults · older teens · daily quiet time
